CREATE TABLE test_json (id INT PRIMARY KEY, json_data STRING);
INSERT INTO test_json VALUES (5, 'Not a json string');
SELECT json.isobject(json_data) FROM test_json WHERE json_data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, json.isobject(json_data) AS is_object FROM test_json WHERE id < 4;
CREATE TABLE nested_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, json_inner STRING);
SELECT json.isobject(json_inner) FROM nested_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT t.id, json.isobject(t.json_data) AS is_object, nt.json_inner FROM test_json t JOIN nested_test nt ON t.id = nt.id;
SELECT t.id, json.isobject(t.json_data) AS is_object FROM test_json t WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM nested_test nt WHERE json.isobject(nt.json_inner));
SELECT t.id FROM test_json t WHERE json.isobject(t.json_data) OR json.isobject('{"a": 1}');
SELECT id, json.isobject(json_data) FROM test_json WHERE json_data LIKE '%"n":%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_json WHERE json.isobject(json_data) = TRUE;
WITH valid_json AS (SELECT json_data FROM test_json WHERE json.isobject(json_data)) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM valid_json;
